conditions: Stage 3 Chronic Kidney Disease, Severe Hypertension
preferences: Fluid restricted diet: Max 1500ml fluid intake daily.
Prefers blood pressure measurement while seated in a quiet room.

daily_routine.name: BP Monitoring
daily_routine.description: Measure and log blood pressure before breakfast.

daily_routine.name: Renal Breakfast
daily_routine.description: Low sodium oatmeal and egg whites.

daily_routine.name: Fluid Intake Check
daily_routine.description: Log running total of fluids. Ensure under 1500ml.

daily_routine.name: Light Yoga/Stretching
daily_routine.description: 15 minutes of seated yoga for circulation.

daily_routine.name: Renal Dinner
daily_routine.description: Grilled chicken breast, steamed green beans (leached).

daily_routine.name: Evening Vitals Check
daily_routine.description: Measure blood pressure and administer night anti-hypertensive.
